sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2026-03-24 19:12
- Distance: 10.1 km
- Moving time: 59:59
- Elapsed time: 1:00:16
- Elevation gain: 55.8 m
- Average heart rate: 157.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 166 bpm
- Average watts: 210.8 W
- Average speed: 10.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `242` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `157.2 bpm`, ranging from `107.5` to `164.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `155.2 bpm` and second-half average HR was `159.9 bpm` (+4.6 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `165.5 spm`, with a working range of `104.0` to `184.0 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `165.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `164.5 spm` (-0.6 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:56 /km` across `10.122 km` in `59:59` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:59 /km` and second-half pace was `5:53 /km` (-6 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `157.6 bpm` average and `166 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `155.5 bpm` in the first half and `159.6 bpm` in the second (+4.1 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `59:59` out of `1:00:16` elapsed (99.5%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `74.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `1.2 m` and `18.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `44.2 m` in the first half and `30.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
